name: Dr. Ali Farooq
qualifications: BDS, MSc (Implant Dentistry, UK), Diplomate ICOI
shortBio: UK-trained implantologist with 14+ years of experience and 2,000+ implants placed. Pioneered All-on-4 protocols in Faisalabad.
fullBio: Dr. Ali completed his MSc in Implant Dentistry from the University of Manchester and has placed more than 2,000 implants across complex full-arch and aesthetic-zone cases. He is a Diplomate of the International Congress of Oral Implantologists and lectures regularly on guided surgery.
education: BDS — University of Health Sciences, Lahore
MSc Implant Dentistry — University of Manchester, UK
Diplomate — International Congress of Oral Implantologists
Advanced Bone Grafting — Karl-Franzens University, Austria

name: Dr. Umber Khan
shortBio: Smile-design specialist with a portfolio of 800+ veneer cases. Passionate about minimally invasive aesthetic dentistry.
fullBio: Dr. Umber is a Fellow of the College of Physicians and Surgeons in Operative Dentistry. Her smile-design portfolio includes hand-layered porcelain veneers, gum-lift aesthetics, and full-mouth rehabilitation cases featured in regional dental journals.
education: BDS — King Edward Medical University
FCPS Operative Dentistry — CPSP
BACD Smile Design Programme — London
Aesthetic Continuum — gIDE Institute

name: Dr. Sarmad Hussain
shortBio: Orthodontist with 1,200+ aligner cases. Treats teens and adults across braces, lingual, and clear aligner systems.
fullBio: Dr. Sarmad has completed his MDS in Orthodontics and is Invisalign-certified at the Diamond tier. He combines digital iTero scanning with cephalometric analysis to design predictable treatment plans.
education: BDS — Aga Khan University
MDS Orthodontics — University of the Punjab
Invisalign Diamond Provider Certification

name: Dr. Mehwish Ali
shortBio: Specialist pediatric dentist trained in behaviour management and minimally invasive child dentistry.
fullBio: Dr. Mehwish trained in pediatric dentistry with a focus on behaviour management and silver diamine fluoride therapy. She has been called the children's favourite by hundreds of parents in Faisalabad.
education: BDS — Lahore Medical & Dental College
MSc Pediatric Dentistry — University of Leeds
Member, Pakistan Society of Pediatric Dentistry

name: Dr. Zara Iqbal
shortBio: Microscope-trained endodontist saving teeth others have written off. 4,000+ root canal treatments completed.
fullBio: Dr. Zara completed her MSc in Endodontics in the United States and brings microscope-assisted endodontics to every case — including retreatments and apicoectomies that other clinics refer out.
education: BDS — Dow University of Health Sciences
MSc Endodontics — NYU College of Dentistry
Microscope Endodontics — Dental XP

name: Dr. Bilal Ahmed
shortBio: Periodontal & laser-gum specialist focused on saving teeth and rebuilding healthy foundations.
fullBio: Dr. Bilal completed his MDS in Periodontics and offers the full periodontal spectrum — from non-surgical hygiene therapy to gum grafting, crown lengthening, and laser-assisted pocket therapy.
education: BDS — University of Health Sciences
MDS Periodontics — University of the Punjab
LANAP Laser Periodontics certified
